name: C. elegans lysosome function across aging and longevity pathways
summary: C. elegans experiments measuring lysosomal morphology, motility, acidity, degradation activity, lysosome-gene expression, and the requirement for lysosome function in lifespan-extension mutants.
model_system: Aging C. elegans and long-lived daf-2, eat-2, and isp-1 mutant worms
